# ACL Volunteer Tracker

> A platform for students and volunteer organizations to log, verify, and showcase community service hours. Includes analytics, achievements, leaderboards, and event discovery.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the volunteer tracker.
- [Features](/features): Hour logging, verification, achievements, and analytics.
- [About](/about): What the product does and who it's for.
- [About Us](/about-us): The team behind the project.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.
- [Help Center](/help): Common questions and troubleshooting.
- [Sign In](/auth): Account access for students, organizations, and admins.
